# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

# VirtualService configurations 1/3 - DestinationRule configuration 2/3 and AuthorizationPolicy (skipped) 3/3
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
 name: istio-mesh-external-svc_allclients
spec:
 disableAutoLoadBalancing: true # Use external IP instead of internal one, for better security (skipped) 2/5  
 hosts:
 - "*" # Replace with actual host or service name(s), if applicable. Also replace '*' as the default gateway address in case it varies from where services are running e.g., traffic management could be done differently than just external IP (skipped) 3/5  
 gateways:
 - istio-mesh # Replace with actual service mesh name(s), if applicable and need to handle requests for different clusters or namespaces within a single Istio installation, replace 'istio-mesh' by your specific gateway e.g., gw1 (skipped) 4/5  
 route:
 - destination: localService # Replace with actual service name(s), if applicable and need to handle requests for different clusters or namespaces within a single Istio installation, replace 'local' by your specific location e.g., loc2 in the case of two instances (skipped) 5/6
